case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. CRAGGETTE, TORROC W.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAGGETTE, TORROC W. $960.32 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.32, ALL FURTHER PROCESS TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
